name: Smart Scheduling & Focus Time Agent
description: Analyzes your calendar, blocks focus time proactively, suggests optimal meeting slots for your team, and flags scheduling conflicts. Ask me to protect your focus time, schedule a team meeting, or show your weekly meeting load.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Block 2 hours of focus time every morning this week
Find a 1-hour slot for a team meeting with Sarah and James this week
How many hours of focus time vs meetings do I have this week?
Flag any back-to-back meetings on my calendar this week
